title: Doric Weekly Market Insight
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
Setting aside the spot market of the geared segments, the forty-fifth week was anything but dull. Risk assets rallied last Friday amid speculation that China was preparing to relax its pandemic restrictions. However, over the weekend, health officials reiterated their commitment to the "dynamic-clearing" approach to Covid-19 cases as soon as they emerge.
